title: Glowing emissive ores - Industrial Revolution Revamped
description: This adds emissive ore textures to the Industrial Revolution Revamped Resource Pack
body:
This adds emissive ore textures to the [Industrial Revolution Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/industrial-revolution-revamped) Resource Pack

This Resource Pack only includes emissive textures for Industrial Revolution ores, so you'll need additional resource pack/s for the rest. Here's my other resource pack that does vanilla and a variety of other mods [Glowing Emissive Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-emissive-ores)

## **Fabric requirements:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Option 1 (Highly recommended)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - (Not needed but I highly recommend this)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - (Required if you're using Sodium)

Continuity only supports Emissive textures on version 1.18.2 or higher

### Option 2
- [MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)
- [MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)

MoreMcmeta supports 1.16.5 and higher
### Option 3 (Not recommended)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
- [OptiFabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric)


</details>
